arts.ttl: and it’s good news for Man Utd
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies appears set to leave Bayern Munich as a free agent in the summer, with the prospect of a switch to Manchester United or Real Madrid rising each day as 1 January approaches. These reports are entirely countered by those from Sky Sport Deutschland, which suggest that Bayern are actually making positive progress towards a new deal for Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Nottingham Forest to Old Trafford for Saturday’s evening kick-off. Ruben Amorim will be asking his team to respond after he lost his first game as United boss to Arsenal in midweek. Amorim will have Lisandro Martinez and Kobbie Mainno back at his disposal after the pair served one-game suspensions against Arsenal. £62 […] The post Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
